headline: Colgate-Palmolive Boosts Payout, Adds New Director to Board
summary: Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) is included among the Dividend Kings and Aristocrats List: 32 Biggest Stocks. On March 11, Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) announced that its Board of Directors approved an increase in the quarterly dividend to $0.53 per share, up from $0.52. The increase will take effect in the second quarter of 2026. On an annual […]
